sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51755" key="kaqeste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθεστέον</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">καθέζομαι</etym>) <sense id="n51755.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must sit down</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:215" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">215</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
